name: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
description: Financial and technical support for establishing micro and small enterprises
benefits: Subsidy up to 25-35% of project cost, loan assistance

name: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: Credit enhancement scheme for agriculture-related startups

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Loans for setting up new enterprises in brown field areas
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to Rs. 1 Crore, credit guarantee

name: Mudra Yojana - Shishu Loan
description: Microfinance scheme for entrepreneurs requiring up to Rs. 50,000
benefits: Loans up to Rs. 50,000 at competitive rates

name: Mudra Yojana - Kishore Loan
description: Microfinance scheme for entrepreneurs requiring Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 5 Lakh
benefits: Loans up to Rs. 5 Lakh, collateral-free

name: Mudra Yojana - Tarun Loan
description: Microfinance scheme for established entrepreneurs requiring Rs. 5 Lakh to Rs. 1 Crore
benefits: Loans up to Rs. 1 Crore, working capital support

name: Credit Guarantee Scheme for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
description: Guarantee coverage for collateral-free loans to MSMEs
benefits: Credit guarantee up to 80% of loan amount

name: Technology Business Incubator (TBI) Scheme
description: Support for tech startups and innovation-based enterprises

name: Export Credit Enhancement Scheme (ECES)
benefits: Concessional export credit at subsidized rates

name: DC-MSME Scheme (Cluster Development)
description: Development of industrial clusters and MSMEs
benefits: Infrastructure development, common facility, technology upgradation
